description: update 运行期输出与提示

replacements.Leveled up! New skills unlocked. You're: 升级了！新技能已解锁。不客气。
replacements.Fresh code, same lobster. Miss me?: 代码是新的，龙虾还是那只。想我了吗？
replacements.Back and better. Did you even notice I w: 回来了，而且更强了。你发现我离开过吗？
replacements.Update complete. I learned some new tric: 更新完成。我不在时学了些新本事。
replacements.New version, who dis? Oh right, still me: 新版本是谁？哦，还是我，只是更亮了。
replacements.Patched, polished, and ready to pinch. L: 已修补、已打磨，随时准备开夹。开整。
replacements.The lobster has molted. Harder shell, sh: 龙虾蜕壳完成。壳更硬，钳更利。
replacements.Update done! Check the changelog or just: 更新完成！可以看更新日志，或者直接信我，确实不错。
replacements.Reborn from the boiling waters of npm. S: 从 npm 的沸水里重生了。现在更强。
replacements.I went away and came back smarter. You s: 我离开了一会，回来时更聪明了。你也该试试。
replacements.Update complete. The bugs feared me, so: 更新完成。Bug 怕我，所以自己跑了。
replacements.New version installed. Old version sends: 新版本已安装。旧版本向你问好。
replacements.I've seen things you wouldn't believe. A: 我见过你难以置信的东西。总之，我更新好了。
replacements.Back online. The changelog is long but o: 重新上线。更新日志很长，但咱俩的交情更长。
replacements.Upgraded! Peter fixed stuff. Blame him i: 升级完成！Peter 修了些东西。要是炸了就怪他。
replacements.Molting complete. Please don't look at m: 蜕壳完成。请别盯着我软壳期看。
replacements.Version bump! Same chaos energy, fewer c: 版本提升！混乱能量不变，崩溃更少了（大概）。
replacements.command returned a non-zero exit code: 命令返回了非零退出码
replacements.Downgrade confirmation would be required: 真实执行时需要确认是否降级。
replacements.Upgrading shell completion to cached ver: 正在将 Shell 补全升级为缓存版本……
正在重新生成 Shell 补全缓存……
replacements.Enable ${status.shell} shell completion: 要为 ${CLI_NAME} 启用 ${status.shell} Shell 补全吗？
replacements.Skipping plugin updates: config is inval: 跳过插件更新：配置无效。
replacements.Found stale gateway process(es) after re: 重启后发现残留网关进程：${health.staleGatewayPids.join(", ")}。正在清理……
replacements.Gateway did not become healthy after res: 重启后网关仍未恢复健康状态。
replacements.Downgrading can break configuration. Re-: 降级可能破坏配置。请在 TTY 中重新运行以确认。
replacements.Downgrading from ${currentVersion} to ${: 从 ${currentVersion} 降级到 ${targetLabel} 可能破坏配置。要继续吗？
replacements.Note: --tag applies to npm installs only: 注意：--tag 仅适用于 npm 安装，git 更新会忽略它。
replacements.Skipped: working directory has uncommitt: 已跳过：工作目录存在未提交更改。请先提交或 stash。
replacements.Tip: Run \\`${replaceCliName(formatCliCo: 提示：运行 \`${replaceCliName(formatCliCommand("openclaw gateway restart"), CLI_NAME)}\` 将更新应用到正在运行的网关。
replacements.Skipped: this OpenClaw install isn't a g: 已跳过：当前 OpenClaw 安装不是 git 检出，且无法检测到包管理器。请通过你的包管理器更新，然后运行 \`${replaceCliName(formatCliCommand("openclaw doctor"), CLI_NAME)}\` 和 \`${replaceCliName(formatCliCommand("openclaw gateway restart"), CLI_NAME)}\`。
replacements.Examples: \\`${replaceCliName(\"npm i -g: 示例：\`${replaceCliName("npm i -g openclaw@latest", CLI_NAME)}\` 或 \`${replaceCliName("pnpm add -g openclaw@latest", CLI_NAME)}\`
replacements.Skipped. Run \\`${replaceCliName(formatC: 已跳过。稍后运行 \`${replaceCliName(formatCliCommand("openclaw completion --install"), CLI_NAME)}\` 以启用。
replacements.Failed to refresh gateway service enviro: 无法从更新后的安装刷新网关服务环境：${String(err)}
replacements.Run \\`${replaceCliName(formatCliCommand: 运行 \`${replaceCliName(formatCliCommand("openclaw gateway status --deep"), CLI_NAME)}\` 查看详情。
replacements.You may need to restart the service manu: 你可能需要手动重启服务：${replaceCliName(formatCliCommand("openclaw gateway restart"), CLI_NAME)}
replacements.Tip: Run \\`${replaceCliName(formatCliCo: 提示：运行 \`${replaceCliName(formatCliCommand("openclaw doctor"), CLI_NAME)}\`，然后运行 \`${replaceCliName(formatCliCommand("openclaw gateway restart"), CLI_NAME)}\`，即可将更新应用到正在运行的网关。
replacements.--tag applies to npm installs only; git: --tag 仅适用于 npm 安装，git 更新会忽略它。
replacements.Config is invalid; cannot set update cha: 配置无效，无法设置更新通道。
replacements.Persist update.channel=${requestedChanne: 将 update.channel=${requestedChannel} 持久化到配置中
replacements.Switch install mode from package to git: 将安装模式从 package 切换为 git checkout（dev 通道）
replacements.Switch install mode from git to package: 将安装模式从 git 切换为包管理器（${mode}）
replacements.Run git update flow on channel ${channel: 在 ${channel} 通道运行 git 更新流程（fetch/rebase/build/doctor）
replacements.Run global package manager update with s: 使用规格 ${packageInstallSpec ?? tag} 运行全局包管理器更新
replacements.Run plugin update sync after core update: 核心更新后执行插件更新同步
replacements.Refresh shell completion cache (if neede: 刷新 Shell 补全缓存（如需要）
replacements.Restart gateway service and run doctor c: 重启网关服务并执行 doctor 检查
replacements.Beta channel resolves to latest for this: 此次运行中 Beta 通道会回退解析为 latest。
replacements.Non-registry package specs skip npm vers: 非 registry 包规格会跳过 npm 版本查询和降级预览。
